scripts.copy-data: mkdir -p apps/mobile/assets apps/web/public && cp data/spots.db apps/mobile/assets/spots.db && cp data/spots.json apps/web/public/spots.json && cp data/france-catalog.json apps/web/public/france-catalog.json
scripts.dev:web: npm run copy-data && npm run dev --workspace=web
scripts.build:web: npm run copy-data && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.android:apk: npm run copy-db && npm run android:apk --workspace=mobile
